title: Polish Macaroni Fritters
description: A twist on the classic Polish dish, these fritters are perfect for a satisfying breakfast or snack.
instructions: 2. Cook the macaroni according to the package instructions until al dente. Drain and set aside.
3. In a large bowl, combine the cooked macaroni, crumbled sausage, chopped scallions, grated carrot, and flour.
4. In a separate bowl, whisk together the eggs, salt, and pepper. Add the egg mixture to the macaroni mixture and stir until well combined.
5. Using your hands, shape the mixture into small patties.
6. Place the patties on a greased griddle or baking sheet and cook for 2-3 minutes on each side, or until golden brown.
7. Transfer the fritters to a baking sheet and bake for an additional 10-12 minutes, or until crispy and cooked through.
